betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Nuclear Fuel Processing§f unlocks material extraction from reactor waste.

§eWorkflow:§f
1. §bSpent Fuel Pool Drum§f - Cool hot fuel rods
2. §bPUREX§f - Reprocess for isotopes
3. §bSILEX§f - Separate rare elements

§eProducts:§f
• Recovered uranium and plutonium
• Technetium-99
• Rare elements (Bismuth, etc.)

§aTip:§f A complete waste processing chain yields many valuable materials.
